channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Anna Wintour’s Vogue Cover Marks a Personal Power Move
item.description: In the upcoming May issue of Vogue, Anna Wintour appears on the cover alongside Meryl Streep, a move that’s more than just promoting the sequel to *The Devil Wears Prada*. This rare appearance signals...

item.title: Gulf-Stranded Tanker Crew Face Mental Health Crisis Amidst Ongoing Conflict
item.description: A concerning situation has unfolded in the Gulf of Hormuz, where a group of oil tanker workers has reached a critical point due to prolonged confinement. Stranded for six weeks due to escalating tensi...

item.title: OpenAI delays UK data centre project amid concerns over energy prices and regulatory uncertainty
item.description: OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, has paused its planned multi‑billion‑pound data centre initiative in north‑east England, citing high energy prices and concerns about regulation. The project, known...

item.title: Authorities Recover $1 Million in Stolen Lego Bricks in Kern County
item.description: Kern County sheriff’s deputies intercepted approximately $1 million worth of stolen Lego products and two stolen freight trailers that were being transported to Riverside County. The recovery followed...

item.title: Trump advises Iran not to impose fees on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US President Donald Trump don issue warning to Iran say make dem no dey collect toll for ships wey dey pass through the Strait of Hormuz. Dis warning come after Iran gree to reopen the strategic water...

item.title: Brigadier-General O.O. Braimoh Killed In ISWAP Attack On Military Base In Borno State
item.description: Fresh details don dey emerge about the death of Brigadier-General O.O. Braimoh, the Brigade Commander wey dem kill during one serious terrorist attack on a military base for Benisheikh, Kaga Local Gov...

item.title: Zambales fishers express doubts over government’s joint energy plan with China in West Philippine Sea
item.description: Fisherfolk in Zambales remain skeptical about the Philippine government’s plan to pursue a joint oil and gas exploration with China in the West Philippine Sea (WPS). According to Leonardo Cuaresma, pr...

item.title: Mark and Margo's Unexpected Connection with Greek Driver on Race Across the World
item.description: Mark, 66, and Margo, 59, are participating in the BBC's 'Race Across the World' challenge, driven by a personal motivation. Their journey is inspired by the wishes of Mark's late wife and Margo's sist...

item.title: Orengo Raises Concerns Over Police Slow Response in Attack on Senator Osotsi
item.description: Siaya Governor James Orengo has expressed serious concerns regarding the police response to the recent attack on Senator Osotsi. Despite the severity of the assault and the availability of key evidenc...

item.title: Court Annuls Sh6 Billion Award in Membe Defamation Case, Rehearing Ordered
item.description: Umeona hapa! The Court of Appeal, yeye ndiyo imetuletea habari kali sana. Part of the judgment concerning the late Benard Membe’s defamation case imetolewa batili. Hii inamaanisha, the whole thing nee...

item.title: Ruto to Present Nairobi County Partnership Progress at Historic Assembly Address
item.description: President William Ruto is set to deliver a groundbreaking address to the Nairobi County Assembly on April 9th, 2026. This is a *big deal* because it’s the first time a sitting president will formally ...

item.title: Deputy President Highlights Government-Business Partnerships for Reindustrialisation
item.description: Deputy President Paul Mashatile, speaking at the Gauteng Investment Conference 2026, stressed the importance of strong partnerships between government and business to promote economic growth, job crea...

item.title: Navigating Family Care: Balancing Aging Relatives and Parenting
item.description: A woman shares her dilemma about her father-in-law, who lives with her and her young family. Initially, they moved him in to help with childcare, but his physical and emotional frailty have complicate...

item.title: Evacuation of multiple Longueuil homes following large fire
item.description: A significant fire has broken out in Longueuil, prompting the evacuation of several homes in the affected area. Emergency responders are on site, working to contain the blaze and ensure the safety of ...

item.title: ADC Convention: Tinubu Government Allegedly Withholds Venue Approvals
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) is currently facing a whole lot of drama, as the Tinubu government is allegedly trying to block their national convention from holding. According to ADC spokesper...

item.title: Documentary Chronicles the Struggles of Opium-Farming Families in Rajasthan
item.description: Vivek Chaudhary’s documentary 'I, Poppy' presents an intimate portrayal of Mangilal Meghwal and his family, Dalit farmers in Rajasthan who are grappling with debt, bureaucratic corruption, and the pre...

item.title: Focusing on Long-Term Solutions to South Africa's Crime Problem
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa announced a SANDF deployment in February 2026 to assist the SAPS in tackling violent crime, framing it as a national security issue comparable to a war due to the high number...

item.title: Drone Strike Hits Kuwait Energy Site amid Regional Tensions
item.description: According to the Wall Street Journal’s live coverage of the ongoing Iran-related conflict, Kuwait’s government announced that a drone attack targeted one of its key energy facilities, raising concerns...

item.title: Zendaya Debuts 3-D Upgrade for On’s New Campaign
item.description: Zendaya is making waves once again with her latest campaign for the sportswear brand On. In a viral video, the actress showcases an impressive 3D version of her outfit, including a black long-sleeve t...

item.title: UK public opinion turns more negative towards US role in world affairs amid Iran conflict, according to new poll
item.description: Due to restricted access to the full article text, a detailed rewrite cannot be produced from the original source. However, based on the headline and related reporting on similar Sky News polls concer...
